block_01: What is the advantage of using take-profit/stop-loss features? As with any trading tool, they have their pros and cons. Their main focus is helping the trader manage their risk and losses while managing the possible positive outcomes as well.
block_02: In this article we will reveal all the secrets of setting stop-loss and take-profit correctly. We will look at all of the possible variations of these features, their benefits, drawbacks and configurations.
block_03: If you wish to understand how to use TP/SL through and through, read on.
